5368.name: none_to_na

5369.code:
import re, json
	
	Rent_Roll_Table = json.loads(Rent_Roll_Table)
	
	rent_list = []
	for row in Rent_Roll_Table:
	  gross_rent = row["Gross Rent"]
	  if gross_rent in ["null", "N/A"] or not gross_rent:
	    continue
	  gross_rent = re.sub('[\$),]', '', gross_rent)
	  gross_rent = re.sub('\(', '-', gross_rent)
	  
	  try:
	    gross_rent = float(gross_rent)
	    rent_list.append(gross_rent)
	  except Exception as e:
	    print(e)
	
	result = max(rent_list)
	result = f'${result:,.2f}'
	
	return result
5369.name: findMax

5370.code:
import json, re, statistics
	
	Rent_Roll_Table = json.loads(Rent_Roll_Table)
	
	rent_list = []
	for row in Rent_Roll_Table:
	  gross_rent = row["Gross Rent per sqft"]
	  if gross_rent in ["null","N/A"] or not gross_rent:
	    continue
	  gross_rent = re.sub('[\$),]', '', gross_rent)
	  gross_rent = re.sub('\(', '-', gross_rent)
	  
	  try:
	    gross_rent = float(gross_rent)
	    rent_list.append(gross_rent)
	  except Exception as e:
	    print(e)
	
	result = statistics.mean(rent_list)
	result = f'${result:,.2f}'
	
	print(result)
	return result
5370.name: findAvg

5371.code:
import json, re
	Rent_Roll_Table = json.loads(Rent_Roll_Table)
	rent_list = []
	for row in Rent_Roll_Table:
	  gross_rent = row["Gross Rent"]
	  if gross_rent in  ["null","N/A"] or not gross_rent:
	    continue
	  gross_rent = re.sub('[\$),]', '', gross_rent)
	  gross_rent = re.sub('\(', '-', gross_rent)
	  try:
	    gross_rent = float(gross_rent)
	    rent_list.append(gross_rent)
	  except Exception as e:
	    print(e)
	result = min(rent_list)
	result = f'${result:,.2f}'
	return result
5371.name: findMin

6068.name: unnamed_custom_function

6138.code:
import json
	data = json.loads(previous_line)
	key_order = ["Unit Number", "Tenant Name", "GLA", "Lease Start date", "Lease End Date",
	        "Lease Type", "Gross Rent", "Base Rent", "Gross Rent Per SqFT",
	        "Rent Roll Date", "Building ID"]
	for record in data:
	    reordered_record = {
	        key: "N/A" if not record.get(key) or record.get(key) == "null" else record[key]
	        for key in key_order
	    }
	    for key in record.keys():
	        if key not in reordered_record:
	            reordered_record[key] = "N/A" if record[key] is None or record[key] == "null" else record[key]
	    record.clear()
	    record.update(reordered_record)
	output = json.dumps(data, indent=4)
	return output
6138.name: Order_function
